sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this Sega Genesis beat 'em up

special_mechanics.name: Beast Riding
special_mechanics.description: Player can mount and ride three types of Bizarrians (Chicken Legs, Green Dragons, Fire Dragons) to attack enemies

special_mechanics.name: Magic System (Revamped)
special_mechanics.description: Player can hold magic button and release when meter reaches desired level to use partial or full magic. Each character has unique elemental magic: Ax Battler uses wind magic, Gilius Thunderhead uses rock magic, Tyris Flare uses fire magic

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Throw Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Players can throw enemies in either direction by pressing left/right on D-pad after picking them up. Ax Battler can throw enemies higher and further than Tyris Flare

special_mechanics.name: Back Attack (360° Hit)
special_mechanics.description: Performed by pressing Jump and Attack buttons simultaneously. Hits enemies on all sides around the character

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Game is a beat 'em up with limited documented physics parameters. No precise movement values available in provided sources. Focus is on gameplay mechanics (magic system, beast riding, throwing) rather than low-level physics parameters typical of platformers.
